subject: Re: Contract renewal terms
snippet: We're evaluating two other vendors before renewal. Need to see the payout issue resolved first.

subject: Q3 usage review
snippet: Finance team flagged that only half our licensed seats are being used.

subject: Loved the new approval mobile flow
snippet: Our AP lead specifically called out how much faster approvals are now.

subject: Escalation: still unresolved after 3 tickets
snippet: This is our third message on the same reconciliation issue. Considering downgrade if unresolved by month end.

subject: Multi-entity rollout for APAC subsidiaries
snippet: Leadership wants to expand to 3 new entities in Q3, asking about enterprise multi-entity pricing.

subject: Great quarter
snippet: Smooth quarter, no major issues, happy with support responsiveness.

subject: Following up on onboarding
snippet: We've been slow to roll this out internally, still only using it for one team.
